linkedin.caption:
EB28 growth brief refresh: Space Coast Local SEO Citations: Build Real Authority

For Space Coast businesses, local citations work when accurate mentions reinforce the same business identity shown on the website, Google Business Profile, review paths, and service pages. The goal is not more directories. The goal is more trust before the buyer submits the form.

shortFormVideo.hook: Local citations are not about being listed everywhere.
shortFormVideo.brief: 15-25 second vertical video. Open with a messy directory list, then cut to three checks: Google profile consistency, credible local mentions, and a website lead path that matches the citation story. End with the EB28 article title and project brief CTA.
shortFormVideo.caption: Citation quality beats directory spam when the whole lead path agrees.
